problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Attention. Attention mechanism with linear complexity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
